stemHtml: An aeroplane in straight and level flight at 300 kts is subjected to a sudden disturbance in speed. Assuming the angle of attack remains constant initially and the load factor reaches a value of approximately 1.2…

options.a: the speed will have decreased by 60 kts.
options.b: the speed will have increased by 30 kts.
options.c: the speed will have increased by 60 kts.
options.d: the speed will have decreased by 30 kts.
